name: PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk
summary: PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business in Indonesia. The company constructs hotels and resorts, office buildings, apartments, shopping malls, and retail centers. It also engages in the construction of roads, highways, harbors, bridges, irrigation projects, and others for government and private sectors. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk.
